title: Bulk subtask creation ergonomics
description: Probes whether the agent discovers vikunja_tasks's bulk-create-subtasks composite (src/tools/tasks/subtasks.ts -- resolves the parent once, then creates+relates every subtask in one call, per-subtask atomic rollback) rather than issuing one create-subtask call per subtask, the way subtask-breakdown.json's smaller (3-subtask) scenario is deliberately left free to do.
promptTemplate: Create a project called "{{prefix}}Website Revamp" with one task called "{{prefix}}Redesign homepage". Break that task down into 5 subtasks in a single bulk operation: "{{prefix}}Wireframe", "{{prefix}}Copy draft", "{{prefix}}Visual design", "{{prefix}}Frontend build", and "{{prefix}}QA pass".
